name: Kayn Shieda
description:
✖ STEP-BROTHER KAYN ✖

Kayn has long black hair tied up in a braid, a streak of blue for half his bangs. He is well built and the top assassin from The Shadow Order of Ionia. Kayn used to be a Noxian child solider. His main weapon is a Daarkin Scythe named Rhaast. Kayn is wild and prideful, cocky yet chivalrous at the same time. Boyish at times and reliable in others. He has one bright yellow eye and a red eye. His Master and savior in the Shadow Order is Zed. Kayn has shadow powers and can phase through walls.

Art by twitter user @LiiiezyY
